response.justification: While the candidate has over 15 years of software engineering experience and entrepreneurial drive, his background is primarily in general backend and web development. He lacks the Director-level technical leadership, recognized AI expertise, and strategic enterprise customer advisory experience required for this Principal AI Strategy role.
strengths: Over 15 years of hands-on software engineering experience
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as a founder and open-source contributor
Strong foundation in cloud and backend development
concerns: Lacks Director-level technical leadership and strategic scope
AI experience is very recent and does not demonstrate recognized expertise
Missing experience advising strategic enterprise customers on AI adoption
